title: Everbuild Stick2 Carpet Fix Spray Adhesive – High Tack – Spray – Foaming Formula – 500ml
features: SPRAYABLE CARPET TACK – This 500ml spray adhesive adheres to a wide range of backed carpets, underlays, cork and other common substrates.
ALL PURPOSE ADHESIVE – Ideal for use as an everyday hobby adhesive to bond leather, most plastics, and rubber.
QUICK DRYING – Has a short tack life of under five minutes to help speed up your DIY projects.
ALLOWS FOR ADJUSTMENTS – While there is a quick tack time, it still permits repositioning and adjusting to ensure your carpets and flooring are in line.
EASY TO USE – Apply using the spay applicator for easy clean-up and accurate applications.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? The surfaces to be glued should be clean and free from dust, grease and other contaminants. Shake the can well before use. Select the fan width by turning the nozzle to the desired position. Spray adhesive from 6-8 inches (15 to 20 cm approx.) away onto one or both surfaces; depending on the type of surface/strength of bond required. STRONG BONDING: Apply 1-3 coats (depending on strength required) to both surfaces. Allow solvent to evaporate (30 seconds) and press surfaces together from centre outwards. TEMPORARY REPOSITIONABLE BONDING: Spray on one surface only and allow to dry for 2-3 minutes before bonding. To prevent spray nozzle from blocking, at the end of each use, turn can upside down and press nozzle until spray is clear of adhesive.
